| Statements | 78.45%  | 80%       | ❌ FAIL (-1.55%) |
| Branches   | 76.90%  | 80%       | ❌ FAIL (-3.10%) |

**Total tests passing: 714 / 714** ✅ (46 test files)

The CI threshold fails on statements, branches, and functions. This audit identifies the specific gaps and prescribes the tests needed to reach ≥80% across all metrics.

## Gap Analysis by Priority

### 🔴 P0 Critical (below 80% — CI failure contributors)

These files are the primary drivers of the threshold failures. Fixing these will bring all metrics above 80%.

| File                                             | Key Gap                                                                                                                  | Missing Test Types                         | Estimated Tests Needed |
| ------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ---------------------- |
| `api/admin.ts`                                   | **0% — completely untested** (lines 259–418)                                                                             | Unit tests for all exported API functions  | 8–10 unit tests        |
| `components/Layout/Header.tsx`                   | **42% statements / 27% branch** — logo fallback, auth-aware menus, notification badge, theme-aware sections all untested | Unit tests for conditional rendering paths | 10–12 unit tests       |
| `components/workspace/LocaleSwitcher.tsx`        | **39% statements / 60% branch** — locale switching logic, dropdown behavior                                              | Unit + integration tests                   | 6–8 unit tests         |
| `components/workspace/SharedResourcesList.tsx`   | **37% statements / 22% functions** — filter logic, pagination, empty states, share/revoke actions                        | Unit + integration tests                   | 8–10 unit tests        |
| `components/workspace/SharePluginDialog.tsx`     | **86% / 72.5% branch** — lines 126–157 (async submission path), 211 (error branch)                                       | Unit tests for async paths                 | 3–4 unit tests         |
| `components/workspace/WorkspaceSettingsForm.tsx` | **74.5% / 62.5% functions** — lines 126–135 (validation edge cases), 177, 252 (async error paths)                        | Unit tests                                 | 4–5 unit tests         |
| `stores/auth.store.ts`                           | **66% branch / 71% functions** — lines 319–325, 345–354 (token refresh, logout edge cases)                               | Unit tests for auth edge cases             | 4–5 unit tests         |

**Estimated impact:** Fixing P0 gaps will add ~43–54 tests, expected to push all metrics above 80%.

---

## Gaps by Test Type

### Missing Unit Tests (35–40 new tests needed)

- `api/admin.ts` — all exported functions (currently 0%)
- `Header.tsx` — conditional logo, auth menus, notification badge, responsive nav
- `LocaleSwitcher.tsx` — locale change handler, dropdown keyboard nav
- `SharedResourcesList.tsx` — filter + pagination + empty states + action handlers
- `SharePluginDialog.tsx` — async submission (lines 126–157), error branch (211)
- `WorkspaceSettingsForm.tsx` — validation edge cases (126–135), error branches
- `auth.store.ts` — token refresh (319–325), logout with pending requests (345–354)

### Missing Integration Tests (8–10 new tests needed)

- Theme API interaction edge cases (covered by T010-28)
- Font loading with real FontFace mock (partially in existing font-loader tests)
- Auth store token refresh triggered from API call 401

### Missing E2E Tests (12+ tests — T010-29)

- Tenant theming journey (3 tests)
- Plugin error recovery journey (3 tests)
- Widget loading journey (3 tests)
- Edge cases: offline, font timeout, session expiry (3 tests)

---

## Recommended Implementation Order (T010-27)

To reach ≥80% statements, branches, and functions in the most efficient order:

1. **`api/admin.ts`** — highest leverage (+6% statements estimated); pure function tests, no DOM
2. **`components/Layout/Header.tsx`** — second biggest gap; already has partial test file to extend
3. **`stores/auth.store.ts`** — branch coverage critical; already has partial test file to extend
4. **`components/workspace/SharedResourcesList.tsx`** — low function coverage (22%)
5. **`components/workspace/WorkspaceSettingsForm.tsx`** — functions at 62.5%
6. **`components/workspace/LocaleSwitcher.tsx`** — statements at 39%
7. P1 medium gaps (AppLayout, WidgetContainer, SidebarNav, etc.)
